name: content-ideas
description: Track competitors across X, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. See what they're posting, what's performing, and get actionable content ideas backed by real engagement data. Ships the content-ideas skill.

interface.shortDescription: A daily For You feed of competitor activity and content ideas
interface.longDescription: Track competitors across X, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. See what they're posting, what's performing, and get actionable content ideas backed by real engagement data. Ships the content-ideas skill.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use content-ideas to scrape my tracked competitors and build today's For You feed of content ideas.
